request_title: Build QBR draft deck with safe thumbnail preview

operations.description: Read the existing QBR template before copying layout decisions.
Inspect the template title slide page object.
Generate a temporary thumbnail preview for visual verification.
Create a blank QBR draft presentation.

human_confirmation.confirmation_text: CONFIRM GOOGLE SLIDES MUTATION: create QBR Draft 2026 in my Workspace account.

operations.description: Create core slides and insert title text in the draft deck.

human_confirmation.confirmation_text: CONFIRM GOOGLE SLIDES MUTATION: batch update draft_qbr_2026 with the approved core slides.

evidence.google_slides_rest: Slides REST v1 supports presentations.create/get/batchUpdate and presentations.pages.get/getThumbnail.
evidence.google_slides_scopes: drive.file is the recommended narrow app-file scope; presentations.readonly and presentations are Slides-specific alternatives.
evidence.google_workspace_mcp: Google Workspace developer docs describe an MCP server for retrieving current Workspace documentation.
evidence.mcp_tools_spec: MCP tools expose named tools with schemas and can request additional input before completion.
evidence.local_docs: docs/google-workspace-mcp-setup.md and docs/mcp-integration.md define workspace-mcp setup for JM-ADK.
